languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} упрямо поджимает губы.{/n} "Исключено. Я лично проверил каждое сочленение, каждый биологический показатель. Процедура была выполнена без ошибок, все импланты и органы функционируют безупречно! Это всего лишь проблема адаптации, неприглядная, но предсказуемая. Эксперимент будет завершен удачно!"

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} упрямо поджимает губы.{/n} "Исключено. Я лично проверил каждое сочленение, каждый биологический показатель. Процедура была выполнена без ошибок, все импланты и органы функционируют безупречно! Это всего лишь проблема адаптации, неприглядная, но предсказуемая. Эксперимент будет завершен удачно!"
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"
languages.original_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Манипулус{/g} упрямо поджимает губы.{/n} "Исключено. Я лично проверил каждое сочленение, каждый биологический показатель. Процедура была выполнена без ошибок, все импланты и органы функционируют безупречно! Это всего лишь проблема адаптации, неприглядная, но предсказуемая. Эксперимент будет завершен удачно!"

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}マニピュラス{/g}の口は硬い線に平らになる.{/n} 「私はその主張を否定します。私は彼の体のあらゆる関節、あらゆる生物学的指標を個人的に見ました。手術は誤りなく行われ、すべてのインプラントと臓器は完璧に機能しています！これは単に適応の問題です―見るのは不快ですが、完全に予測可能なものです。実験は成功するでしょう！」
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}嘴角紧绷成一条僵硬的直线。{/n}“对这一说法，我要提出反驳。我亲自检查了他身体的每一处关节，每一个生物学指标。手术无可挑剔，所有植入物和器官运转完美！这只是适配过程中的不适——虽观感欠佳，但完全在预料之中。实验一定会成功！”
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}嘴角紧绷成一条僵硬的直线。{/n}“对这一说法，我要提出反驳。我亲自检查了他身体的每一处关节，每一个生物学指标。手术无可挑剔，所有植入物和器官运转完美！这只是适配过程中的不适——虽观感欠佳，但完全在预料之中。实验一定会成功！”

languages.text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} pince les lèvres.{/n} « Je rejette cette déclaration. J'ai personnellement vérifié chacune des articulations de son corps, l'ensemble des indicateurs biologiques. L'opération a été effectuée sans la moindre erreur, tous les implants et les organes fonctionnent à la perfection ! Il s'agit simplement d'un problème d'adaptation, totalement prévisible malgré les désagréments qu'il entraîne. L'expérience sera un succès ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} pince les lèvres.{/n} « Je rejette cette déclaration. J'ai personnellement vérifié chacune des articulations de son corps, l'ensemble des indicateurs biologiques. L'opération a été effectuée sans la moindre erreur, tous les implants et les organes fonctionnent à la perfection ! Il s'agit simplement d'un problème d'adaptation, totalement prévisible malgré les désagréments qu'il entraîne. L'expérience sera un succès ! »

languages.text: {n}La boca del {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se convierte en una línea dura.{/n} «Rechazo esa afirmación. He comprobado personalmente cada articulación de su cuerpo, cada indicador biológico. El procedimiento se realizó sin ningún error. ¡Todos los órganos e implantes funcionan perfectamente! Se trata tan solo de un problema de adaptación: desagradable a la vista, pero completamente predecible. ¡El experimento será un éxito!».
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"

He comprobado personalmente cada articulación de su cuerpo, cada indicador biológico. El procedimiento se realizó sin ningún error. ¡Todos los órganos e implantes funcionan perfectamente! Se trata tan solo de un problema de adaptación: desagradable a la vista, pero completamente predecible. ¡El experimento será un éxito!».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus'un{/g} ağzı, sert bir çizgi hâlini alıyor.{/n} "Bu ifadeyi reddediyorum. Vücudundaki her eklemi, her biyolojik göstergeyi bizzat kontrol ettim. Prosedür hatasız gerçekleştirildi, tüm implantlar ve organlar kusursuz çalışıyor! Ufak bir uyum sorunu bu. Buna tanık olmamız tatsız ama durum tamamen öngörülebilir. Deneyin sonucu başarılı olacak!"
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s mouth flattens into a hard line.{/n} "I refute that statement. I have personally checked every articulation in his body, every biological indicator. The procedure was performed without error, all implants and organs are functioning flawlessly! This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus'un{/g} ağzı, sert bir çizgi hâlini alıyor.{/n} "Bu ifadeyi reddediyorum. Vücudundaki her eklemi, her biyolojik göstergeyi bizzat kontrol ettim. Prosedür hatasız gerçekleştirildi, tüm implantlar ve organlar kusursuz çalışıyor! Ufak bir uyum sorunu bu. Buna tanık olmamız tatsız ama durum tamamen öngörülebilir. Deneyin sonucu başarılı olacak!"

languages.text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} presst die Lippen zusammen.{/n} "Dem muss ich widersprechen. Ich habe persönlich jede Artikulation in seinem Körper und sämtliche biologischen Indikatoren geprüft. Die Prozedur wurde fehlerlos durchgeführt. Alle Implantate und Organe funktionieren einwandfrei! Wir haben es lediglich mit einem Adaptionsproblem zu tun ... unerfreulich, aber absolut vorhersehbar. Das Experiment wird erfolgreich sein!"

This is merely a problem of adaptation — unpleasant to witness, but wholly predictable. The experiment will have a successful outcome!"
